title: The Jackpot
writer: John McNulty, Phoebe Ephron, Henry Ephron
actors: James Stewart, Barbara Hale, James Gleason
plot: Bill Lawrence wins a jackpot worth $24,000 on a radio quiz program. His happiness, and that of his family, is short-lived after he discovers he'll be compelled to sell the prizes in order to pay an amount of $7,000 income tax on t...
